Soft limit summary

Soft limit warning

Soft limit warnings matter when they explain which workload classes may temporarily cross advisory thresholds, how operators should stage backpressure before hard enforcement, and what client-side pacing changes should land before the warning window closes.

Useful warnings also document alert thresholds, retry smoothing, and the fallback routing controls teams should keep enabled while soft-limit behavior is monitored.
